Unfortunately, GIP still remains highly difficult to solve at scale as it requires simultaneously satisfying POI-coverage and path-connectivity constraints, giving rise to a challenging optimization problem, particularly at scales encountered in real-world scenarios. In this work, we present highly scalable Mixed Integer Linear Programming (MILP) solutions for GIP that significantly advance the state-of-the-art in both runtime and solution quality. Our key insight is a reformulation of the problem's core constraints as a network flow, which enables effective MILP models and a specialized Branch-and-Cut solver that exploits the combinatorial structure of flows. We evaluate our approach on medical and infrastructure benchmarks alongside large-scale synthetic instances. Across all scenarios, our method produces substantially tighter lower bounds than existing formulations, reducing optimality gaps by 30-50% on large instances. Furthermore, our solver demonstrates unprecedented scalability: it provides non-trivial solutions for problems with up to 15,000 vertices and thousands of POIs, where prior state-of-the-art methods typically exhaust memory or fail to provide any meaningful optimality guarantees.
tldr: The paper presents a scalable Mixed Integer Linear Programming (MILP) solution for the Graph Inspection Planning (GIP) problem, achieving significant improvements in runtime and solution quality by reformulating core constraints as a network flow and developing a specialized Branch-and-Cut solver.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种可扩展的混合整数线性规划(MILP)解决方案，用于图检验规划(GIP)问题。通过将核心约束重构为网络流，并开发专门的分支切割求解器，可以在运行时和解决方案质量方面实现显著改进。
summary_zh: 检测规划问题关注的是计算最短的机器人路径，以利用机器人的传感器检测给定的感兴趣点（POI）集合。这个问题出现在从制造业到医疗机器人的广泛应用中。为了减轻问题的复杂性，最近的方法依赖于基于采样的方法来获得更易于管理的（离散）图检测规划（GIP）问题。不幸的是，GIP在大规模情况下仍然难以解决，因为它需要同时满足POI覆盖和路径连通性约束，从而产生一个具有挑战性的优化问题，尤其是在现实世界场景中遇到的规模下。 在这项工作中，我们提出了高度可扩展的混合整数线性规划（MILP）解决方案，用于解决GIP问题，并在运行时间和解决方案质量方面显著提升了现有技术水平。我们的关键在于将问题的核心约束重新定义为网络流，从而实现有效的MILP模型和一个专门的分支定界求解器，该求解器利用了流的组合结构。我们评估了我们的方法，使用了医疗和基础设施的基准以及大规模的合成实例。在所有场景中，我们的方法产生了比现有公式更严格的下界，在大规模实例上将最优性差距降低了30-50%。此外，我们的求解器展示了前所未有的可扩展性：它为具有多达15,000个顶点和数千个POI的问题提供了非平凡的解决方案，而之前的最先进的方法通常会耗尽内存或无法提供任何有意义的最优性保证。

title: Controlling Fish Schools via Reinforcement Learning of Virtual Fish Movement
summary: This study investigates a method to guide and control fish schools using virtual fish trained with reinforcement learning. We utilize 2D virtual fish displayed on a screen to overcome technical challenges such as durability and movement constraints inherent in physical robotic agents. To address the lack of detailed behavioral models for real fish, we adopt a model-free reinforcement learning approach. First, simulation results show that reinforcement learning can acquire effective movement policies even when simulated real fish frequently ignore the virtual stimulus. Second, real-world experiments with live fish confirm that the learned policy successfully guides fish schools toward specified target directions. Statistical analysis reveals that the proposed method significantly outperforms baseline conditions, including the absence of stimulus and a heuristic "stay-at-edge" strategy. This study provides an early demonstration of how reinforcement learning can be used to influence collective animal behavior through artificial agents.
tldr: This paper uses reinforcement learning to train virtual fish displayed on a screen to guide real fish schools, demonstrating successful guidance towards target directions in real-world experiments, outperforming baseline methods.
tldr_zh: 本文利用强化学习训练屏幕上显示的虚拟鱼引导真实的鱼群。实验结果表明，该方法能成功地引导鱼群朝着指定方向移动，效果优于基线方法。
summary_zh: 本研究探讨了一种利用强化学习训练的虚拟鱼引导和控制鱼群的方法。我们使用在屏幕上显示的二维虚拟鱼，以克服实体机器人代理固有的耐用性和运动约束等技术挑战。为了解决真实鱼类缺乏详细行为模型的问题，我们采用了一种无模型的强化学习方法。首先，仿真结果表明，即使模拟的真实鱼类经常忽略虚拟刺激，强化学习也能获得有效的运动策略。其次，对活鱼进行的真实世界实验证实，学习到的策略成功地引导鱼群朝着指定目标方向移动。统计分析表明，所提出的方法显著优于基线条件，包括无刺激和启发式“边缘停留”策略。这项研究初步展示了如何利用强化学习通过人工代理影响集体动物行为。

title: Featurized Occupation Measures for Structured Global Search in Numerical Optimal Control
summary: Numerical optimal control is commonly divided between globally structured but dimensionally intractable Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman (HJB) methods and scalable but local trajectory optimization. We introduce the Featurized Occupation Measure (FOM), a finite-dimensional primal-dual interface for the occupation-measure formulation that unifies trajectory search and global HJB-type certification. FOM is broad yet numerically tractable, covering both explicit weak-form schemes and implicit simulator- or rollout-based sampling methods. Within this framework, approximate HJB subsolutions serve as intrinsic numerical certificates to directly evaluate and guide the primal search. We prove asymptotic consistency with the exact infinite-dimensional occupation-measure problem, and show that for block-organized feasible certificates, finite-dimensional approximation preserves certified lower bounds with blockwise error and complexity control. We also establish persistence of these lower bounds under time shifts and bounded model perturbations. Consequently, these structural properties render global certificates into flexible, reusable computational objects, establishing a systematic basis for certificate-guided optimization in nonlinear control.
tldr: The paper introduces a novel method called Featurized Occupation Measure (FOM) for numerical optimal control, bridging globally structured HJB methods and scalable trajectory optimization with intrinsic numerical certificates for improved performance and global guarantees.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为 Featurized Occupation Measure (FOM) 的新型数值最优控制方法，它弥合了全局结构化的 HJB 方法和可扩展的轨迹优化，并使用内在的数值证书来提高性能和提供全局保证。
summary_zh: 数值最优控制通常分为全局结构化但维度上难以处理的 Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman (HJB) 方法，以及可扩展但局部的轨迹优化方法。我们引入了特征化占用测度 (FOM)，这是一个有限维的原始-对偶接口，用于处理占用测度公式，统一了轨迹搜索和全局 HJB 型验证。FOM 具有广泛性且在数值上易于处理，涵盖了显式弱形式方案以及基于隐式模拟器或 rollout 的采样方法。在此框架内，近似 HJB 子解充当内在的数值证书，可直接评估和指导原始搜索。我们证明了其与精确的无限维占用测度问题渐近一致，并表明对于分块组织的有效证书，有限维近似通过分块误差和复杂度控制保留了经过验证的下界。我们还建立了这些下界在时间偏移和有界模型扰动下的持续性。因此，这些结构性属性使全局证书成为灵活、可重用的计算对象，为非线性控制中的证书引导优化奠定了系统的基础。

title: Gaze-Aware Task Progression Detection Framework for Human-Robot Interaction Using RGB Cameras
summary: In human-robot interaction (HRI), detecting a human's gaze helps robots interpret user attention and intent. However, most gaze detection approaches rely on specialized eye-tracking hardware, limiting deployment in everyday settings. Appearance-based gaze estimation methods remove this dependency by using standard RGB cameras, but their practicality in HRI remains underexplored. We present a calibration-free framework for detecting task progression when information is conveyed via integrated display interfaces. The framework uses only the robot's built-in monocular RGB camera (640x480 resolution) and state-of-the-art gaze estimation to monitor attention patterns. It leverages natural behavior, where users shift focus from task interfaces to the robot's face to signal task completion, formalized through three Areas of Interest (AOI): tablet, robot face, and elsewhere. Systematic parameter optimization identifies configurations that balance detection accuracy and interaction latency. We validate our framework in a "First Day at Work" scenario, comparing it to button-based interaction. Results show a task completion detection accuracy of 77.6%. Compared to button-based interaction, the proposed system exhibits slightly higher response latency but preserves information retention and significantly improves comfort, social presence, and perceived naturalness. Notably, most participants reported that they did not consciously use eye movements to guide the interaction, underscoring the intuitive role of gaze as a communicative cue. This work demonstrates the feasibility of intuitive, low-cost, RGB-only gaze-based HRI for natural and engaging interactions.
tldr: This paper presents a calibration-free, RGB-camera-based gaze detection framework for task progression in HRI. It achieves 77.6% accuracy in a 'First Day at Work' scenario, offering improved comfort and naturalness compared to button-based interaction.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于RGB相机的免校准注视检测框架，用于人机交互中的任务进度识别。该框架在 “第一天上班” 场景中实现了77.6%的准确率，与基于按钮的交互相比，提供了更好的舒适性和自然性。
summary_zh: 在人机交互（HRI）中，检测人类的视线有助于机器人解读用户的注意力和意图。然而，大多数视线检测方法依赖于专用的眼动追踪硬件，限制了其在日常环境中的部署。基于外观的视线估计方法通过使用标准RGB摄像头消除了这一依赖，但其在HRI中的实用性仍未得到充分探索。我们提出了一种无需校准的框架，用于检测通过集成显示界面传递信息时的任务进展。该框架仅使用机器人内置的单目RGB摄像头（640x480分辨率）和最先进的视线估计技术来监测注意力模式。它利用了用户将注意力从任务界面转移到机器人脸部以表示任务完成的自然行为，并通过三个感兴趣区域（AOI）进行形式化：平板电脑、机器人脸部和其他区域。系统化的参数优化确定了平衡检测精度和交互延迟的配置。我们在一个“工作第一天”的场景中验证了我们的框架，并将其与基于按钮的交互方式进行了比较。结果显示，任务完成检测准确率为77.6%。与基于按钮的交互相比，所提出的系统表现出略高的响应延迟，但保留了信息记忆，并显著提高了舒适性、社交存在感和感知自然度。值得注意的是，大多数参与者表示他们没有有意识地使用眼部运动来引导交互，这突显了视线作为一种交流线索的直观作用。这项工作展示了利用直观、低成本、仅依赖RGB的基于视线的HRI实现自然且引人入胜的交互的可行性。

title: SOMA: Unifying Parametric Human Body Models
summary: Parametric human body models are foundational to human reconstruction, animation, and simulation, yet they remain mutually incompatible: SMPL, SMPL-X, MHR, Anny, and related models each diverge in mesh topology, skeletal structure, shape parameterization, and unit convention, making it impractical to exploit their complementary strengths within a single pipeline. We present SOMA, a unified body layer that bridges these heterogeneous representations through three abstraction layers. Mesh topology abstraction maps any source model's identity to a shared canonical mesh in constant time per vertex. Skeletal abstraction recovers a full set of identity-adapted joint transforms from any body shape, whether in rest pose or an arbitrary posed configuration, in a single closed-form pass, with no iterative optimization or per-model training. Pose abstraction inverts the skinning pipeline to recover unified skeleton rotations directly from posed vertices of any supported model, enabling heterogeneous motion datasets to be consumed without custom retargeting. Together, these layers reduce the $O(M^2)$ per-pair adapter problem to $O(M)$ single-backend connectors, letting practitioners freely mix identity sources and pose data at inference time. The entire pipeline is fully differentiable end-to-end and GPU-accelerated via NVIDIA-Warp.
tldr: The paper introduces SOMA, a unified body layer that bridges different parametric human body models (SMPL, SMPL-X, etc.) using mesh, skeletal, and pose abstraction, enabling their interoperability and reducing complexity.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了 SOMA，一个统一的人体层，它通过网格、骨骼和姿势抽象桥接了不同的人体参数模型（SMPL、SMPL-X 等），从而实现了它们的互操作性并降低了复杂性。
summary_zh: 参数化人体模型是人体重建、动画和模拟的基础，但它们仍然互不兼容：SMPL、SMPL-X、MHR、Anny以及相关模型在网格拓扑、骨骼结构、形状参数化和单位约定方面各不相同，这使得在单个流程中利用它们的互补优势变得不切实际。我们提出了SOMA，一个统一的人体层，通过三个抽象层弥合了这些异构表示。网格拓扑抽象将任何源模型的身份以每个顶点恒定的时间映射到共享的规范网格。骨骼抽象从任何体型（无论是在静止姿势还是任意姿势配置下）以单次闭合形式恢复一整套身份自适应的关节变换，无需迭代优化或每个模型的训练。姿势抽象反转了蒙皮流程，直接从任何支持模型的姿势顶点恢复统一的骨骼旋转，从而无需自定义重定向即可使用异构运动数据集。总之，这些层将$O(M^2)$的每对适配器问题简化为$O(M)$的单后端连接器，使得从业者可以在推理时自由混合身份来源和姿势数据。整个流程是完全可微分的端到端，并通过NVIDIA-Warp进行GPU加速。

title: VIGIL: Towards Edge-Extended Agentic AI for Enterprise IT Support
summary: Enterprise IT support is constrained by heterogeneous devices, evolving policies, and long-tail failure modes that are difficult to resolve centrally. We present VIGIL, an edge-extended agentic AI system that deploys desktop-resident agents to perform situated diagnosis, retrieval over enterprise knowledge, and policy-governed remediation directly on user devices with explicit consent and end-to-end observability. In a 10-week pilot of VIGIL's operational loop on 100 resource-constrained endpoints, VIGIL reduces interaction rounds by 39%, achieves at least 4 times faster diagnosis, and supports self-service resolution in 82% of matched cases. Users report excellent usability, high trust, and low cognitive workload across four validated instruments, with qualitative feedback highlighting transparency as critical for trust. Notably, users rated the system higher when no historical matches were available, suggesting on-device diagnosis provides value independent of knowledge base coverage. This pilot establishes safety and observability foundations for fleet-wide continuous improvement.
tldr: The paper introduces VIGIL, an edge-extended agentic AI system for enterprise IT support that achieves faster diagnosis and self-service resolution on user devices while maintaining transparency and user trust.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为VIGIL的边缘扩展代理AI系统，用于企业IT支持，该系统可在用户设备上实现更快的诊断和自助服务，同时保持透明度和用户信任。
summary_zh: 企业IT支持受限于异构设备、不断演变的策略以及难以集中解决的长尾故障模式。我们提出了VIGIL，一种边缘扩展的智能体AI系统，它部署驻留在桌面端的智能体，以便直接在用户设备上执行情境化诊断、企业知识检索以及策略驱动的修复，并提供明确的同意和端到端的可观测性。在一个为期 10 周的 VIGIL 操作循环试点中，针对 100 个资源受限的端点，VIGIL 将交互轮次减少了 39%，诊断速度至少提高了 4 倍，并在 82% 的匹配案例中支持自助服务解决。用户在使用四个经过验证的工具后报告了极佳的可用性、高度信任和低认知负荷，定性反馈强调透明度对于信任至关重要。值得注意的是，当没有历史匹配可用时，用户对系统的评价更高，这表明设备端诊断提供了独立于知识库覆盖率的价值。此试点为整个机队的持续改进奠定了安全性和可观测性基础。

title: Collaborative Temporal Feature Generation via Critic-Free Reinforcement Learning for Cross-User Sensor-Based Activity Recognition
summary: Human Activity Recognition using wearable inertial sensors is foundational to healthcare monitoring, fitness analytics, and context-aware computing, yet its deployment is hindered by cross-user variability arising from heterogeneous physiological traits, motor habits, and sensor placements. Existing domain generalization approaches either neglect temporal dependencies in sensor streams or depend on impractical target-domain annotations. We propose a different paradigm: modeling generalizable feature extraction as a collaborative sequential generation process governed by reinforcement learning. Our framework, CTFG (Collaborative Temporal Feature Generation), employs a Transformer-based autoregressive generator that incrementally constructs feature token sequences, each conditioned on prior context and the encoded sensor input. The generator is optimized via Group-Relative Policy Optimization, a critic-free algorithm that evaluates each generated sequence against a cohort of alternatives sampled from the same input, deriving advantages through intra-group normalization rather than learned value estimation. This design eliminates the distribution-dependent bias inherent in critic-based methods and provides self-calibrating optimization signals that remain stable across heterogeneous user distributions. A tri-objective reward comprising class discrimination, cross-user invariance, and temporal fidelity jointly shapes the feature space to separate activities, align user distributions, and preserve fine-grained temporal content. Evaluations on the DSADS and PAMAP2 benchmarks demonstrate state-of-the-art cross-user accuracy (88.53\% and 75.22\%), substantial reduction in inter-task training variance, accelerated convergence, and robust generalization under varying action-space dimensionalities.
tldr: This paper introduces CTFG, a critic-free reinforcement learning framework for generating generalizable features from wearable sensor data for cross-user human activity recognition. They demonstrate state-of-the-art results on two benchmark datasets.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为CTFG的无批评家强化学习框架，用于从可穿戴传感器数据中生成可泛化的特征，以进行跨用户的人类活动识别。他们在两个基准数据集上展示了最先进的结果。
summary_zh: 基于可穿戴惯性传感器的活动识别是医疗健康监测、健身数据分析和情境感知计算的基础，但其部署受到异构生理特征、运动习惯和传感器放置方式造成的跨用户差异性的阻碍。现有的领域泛化方法要么忽略了传感器数据流中的时间依赖性，要么依赖于不切实际的目标领域标注。我们提出了一种不同的范式：将可泛化的特征提取建模为一个由强化学习驱动的协同序列生成过程。我们的框架CTFG（协同时间特征生成）采用基于Transformer的自回归生成器，以增量方式构建特征令牌序列，每个序列都以先前的上下文和编码后的传感器输入为条件。生成器通过组相对策略优化进行优化，这是一种无批评器的算法，它针对同一输入采样出的一组备选序列来评估每个生成的序列，通过组内归一化而不是学习到的价值估计来得出优势。这种设计消除了基于批评器的方法中固有的分布依赖性偏差，并提供了自我校准的优化信号，这些信号在异构用户分布中保持稳定。包含类别区分、跨用户不变性和时间忠实性的三目标奖励共同塑造了特征空间，以区分活动、对齐用户分布并保留细粒度的时间内容。在DSADS和PAMAP2基准上的评估表明，该方法具有最先进的跨用户准确率（88.53%和75.22%），显著降低了任务间训练方差，加速了收敛，并且在不同的动作空间维度下具有鲁棒的泛化能力。

title: When the City Teaches the Car: Label-Free 3D Perception from Infrastructure
summary: Building robust 3D perception for self-driving still relies heavily on large-scale data collection and manual annotation, yet this paradigm becomes impractical as deployment expands across diverse cities and regions. Meanwhile, modern cities are increasingly instrumented with roadside units (RSUs), static sensors deployed along roads and at intersections to monitor traffic. This raises a natural question: can the city itself help train the vehicle? We propose infrastructure-taught, label-free 3D perception, a paradigm in which RSUs act as stationary, unsupervised teachers for ego vehicles. Leveraging their fixed viewpoints and repeated observations, RSUs learn local 3D detectors from unlabeled data and broadcast predictions to passing vehicles, which are aggregated as pseudo-label supervision for training a standalone ego detector. The resulting model requires no infrastructure or communication at test time. We instantiate this idea as a fully label-free three-stage pipeline and conduct a concept-and-feasibility study in a CARLA-based multi-agent environment. With CenterPoint, our pipeline achieves 82.3% AP for detecting vehicles, compared to a fully supervised ego upper bound of 94.4%. We further systematically analyze each stage, evaluate its scalability, and demonstrate complementarity with existing ego-centric label-free methods. Together, these results suggest that city infrastructure itself can potentially provide a scalable supervisory signal for autonomous vehicles, positioning infrastructure-taught learning as a promising orthogonal paradigm for reducing annotation cost in 3D perception.
tldr: The paper proposes a novel paradigm for training 3D perception in autonomous vehicles using roadside unit (RSU) infrastructure to provide label-free supervision, achieving promising results in a simulated environment.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种新的范例，利用路侧单元（RSU）基础设施为自动驾驶汽车的3D感知训练提供无标签监督，并在模拟环境中取得了有希望的结果。
summary_zh: 为自动驾驶构建稳健的3D感知仍然严重依赖大规模的数据采集和人工标注，但随着部署扩展到不同的城市和地区，这种模式变得不切实际。与此同时，现代城市越来越多地配备路侧单元（RSU），即部署在道路沿线和交叉路口的静态传感器，用于监控交通。这引出一个自然的问题：城市本身能否帮助训练车辆？我们提出了一种基础设施引导的、无标签的3D感知方法，在这种模式下，RSU充当静态的、无监督的教师，用于自我车辆。利用其固定的视角和重复的观察，RSU从无标签数据中学习局部3D检测器，并将预测广播给经过的车辆，这些预测被聚合为伪标签监督，用于训练独立的自我检测器。最终的模型在测试时不需要基础设施或通信。我们将这个想法实例化为一个完全无标签的三阶段流水线，并在基于CARLA的多智能体环境中进行概念和可行性研究。利用CenterPoint，我们的流水线在车辆检测方面实现了82.3%的AP，相比之下，完全监督的自我上界为94.4%。我们进一步系统地分析了每个阶段，评估了其可扩展性，并展示了与现有的以自我为中心的无标签方法的互补性。总而言之，这些结果表明，城市基础设施本身有可能为自动驾驶汽车提供可扩展的监督信号，从而将基础设施引导的学习定位为一种有前景的正交范例，以降低3D感知中的标注成本。

title: $x^2$-Fusion: Cross-Modality and Cross-Dimension Flow Estimation in Event Edge Space
summary: Estimating dense 2D optical flow and 3D scene flow is essential for dynamic scene understanding. Recent work combines images, LiDAR, and event data to jointly predict 2D and 3D motion, yet most approaches operate in separate heterogeneous feature spaces. Without a shared latent space that all modalities can align to, these systems rely on multiple modality-specific blocks, leaving cross-sensor mismatches unresolved and making fusion unnecessarily complex.Event cameras naturally provide a spatiotemporal edge signal, which we can treat as an intrinsic edge field to anchor a unified latent representation, termed the Event Edge Space. Building on this idea, we introduce $x^2$-Fusion, which reframes multimodal fusion as representation unification: event-derived spatiotemporal edges define an edge-centric homogeneous space, and image and LiDAR features are explicitly aligned in this shared representation.Within this space, we perform reliability-aware adaptive fusion to estimate modality reliability and emphasize stable cues under degradation. We further employ cross-dimension contrast learning to tightly couple 2D optical flow with 3D scene flow. Extensive experiments on both synthetic and real benchmarks show that $x^2$-Fusion achieves state-of-the-art accuracy under standard conditions and delivers substantial improvements in challenging scenarios.
tldr: The paper introduces $x^2$-Fusion, a novel multimodal fusion approach for optical and scene flow estimation, using event-derived spatiotemporal edges to create a unified latent representation for image and LiDAR data, achieving state-of-the-art results.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了$x^2$-Fusion，一种用于光流和场景流估计的新型多模态融合方法，使用事件导出的时空边缘来为图像和激光雷达数据创建统一的潜在表示，实现了最先进的结果。
summary_zh: 估计稠密2D光流和3D场景流对于动态场景理解至关重要。最近的研究结合了图像、激光雷达和事件数据来联合预测2D 和 3D 运动，但大多数方法在分离的异构特征空间中进行操作。由于缺乏所有模态可以对齐的共享潜在空间，这些系统依赖于多个模态特定的模块，导致跨传感器不匹配问题无法解决，并且使融合变得不必要地复杂。事件相机自然地提供时空边缘信号，我们可以将其视为一种内在边缘场，用于锚定一个统一的潜在表示，我们称之为事件边缘空间。基于这个想法，我们引入了$x^2$-Fusion，它将多模态融合重新定义为表示统一：事件导出的时空边缘定义了一个以边缘为中心的同构空间，并且图像和激光雷达特征在这个共享的表示中显式对齐。 在这个空间中，我们执行可靠性感知自适应融合，以估计模态可靠性并强调退化下稳定的线索。我们进一步采用跨维度对比学习来紧密耦合2D光流和3D场景流。在合成和真实基准上的大量实验表明，$x^2$-Fusion在标准条件下实现了最先进的精度，并在具有挑战性的场景中提供了显著的改进。

title: Advancing Visual Reliability: Color-Accurate Underwater Image Enhancement for Real-Time Underwater Missions
summary: Underwater image enhancement plays a crucial role in providing reliable visual information for underwater platforms, since strong absorption and scattering in water-related environments generally lead to image quality degradation. Existing high-performance methods often rely on complex architectures, which hinder deployment on underwater devices. Lightweight methods often sacrifice quality for speed and struggle to handle severely degraded underwater images. To address this limitation, we present a real-time underwater image enhancement framework with accurate color restoration. First, an Adaptive Weighted Channel Compensation module is introduced to achieve dynamic color recovery of the red and blue channels using the green channel as a reference anchor. Second, we design a Multi-branch Re-parameterized Dilated Convolution that employs multi-branch fusion during training and structural re-parameterization during inference, enabling large receptive field representation with low computational overhead. Finally, a Statistical Global Color Adjustment module is employed to optimize overall color performance based on statistical priors. Extensive experiments on eight datasets demonstrate that the proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance across seven evaluation metrics. The model contains only 3,880 inference parameters and achieves an inference speed of 409 FPS. Our method improves the UCIQE score by 29.7% under diverse environmental conditions, and the deployment on ROV platforms and performance gains in downstream tasks further validate its superiority for real-time underwater missions.
tldr: This paper presents a real-time underwater image enhancement framework with accurate color restoration, achieving state-of-the-art performance with a lightweight architecture suitable for deployment on underwater devices.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种具有精确色彩恢复的实时水下图像增强框架，该框架以轻量级架构实现了最先进的性能，适用于水下设备的部署。
summary_zh: 水下图像增强在为水下平台提供可靠的视觉信息方面起着至关重要的作用，因为水相关环境中强烈的吸收和散射通常导致图像质量下降。现有的高性能方法通常依赖于复杂的架构，这阻碍了在水下设备上的部署。轻量级方法通常以牺牲质量换取速度，并且难以处理严重退化的水下图像。为了解决这一局限性，我们提出了一种具有精确色彩恢复的实时水下图像增强框架。首先，引入了一种自适应加权通道补偿模块，以绿色通道为参考锚，实现红、蓝通道的动态色彩恢复。其次，我们设计了一种多分支重参数化空洞卷积，在训练期间采用多分支融合，在推理期间采用结构重参数化，从而以低计算开销实现大感受野表示。最后，采用统计全局颜色调整模块，基于统计先验优化整体颜色表现。在八个数据集上的大量实验表明，所提出的方法在七个评估指标上均实现了最先进的性能。该模型仅包含 3,880 个推理参数，推理速度达到 409 FPS。我们的方法在各种环境条件下将 UCIQE 分数提高了 29.7%，并且在 ROV 平台上的部署以及下游任务中的性能提升进一步验证了其在实时水下任务中的优越性。

title: DualPrim: Compact 3D Reconstruction with Positive and Negative Primitives
summary: Neural reconstructions often trade structure for fidelity, yielding dense and unstructured meshes with irregular topology and weak part boundaries that hinder editing, animation, and downstream asset reuse. We present DualPrim, a compact and structured 3D reconstruction framework. Unlike additive-only implicit or primitive methods, DualPrim represents shapes with positive and negative superquadrics: the former builds the bases while the latter carves local volumes through a differentiable operator, enabling topology-aware modeling of holes and concavities. This additive-subtractive design increases the representational power without sacrificing compactness or differentiability. We embed DualPrim in a volumetric differentiable renderer, enabling end-to-end learning from multi-view images and seamless mesh export via closed-form boolean difference. Empirically, DualPrim delivers state-of-the-art accuracy and produces compact, structured, and interpretable outputs that better satisfy downstream needs than additive-only alternatives.
tldr: DualPrim introduces a novel 3D reconstruction method using both positive and negative superquadrics for compact and structured mesh generation, improving upon existing methods that often lack structure and have weak part boundaries.
tldr_zh: DualPrim 提出了一种新的 3D 重建方法，它使用正和负超二次曲面来生成紧凑且结构化的网格，改进了现有方法，这些方法通常缺乏结构并且部分边界较弱。
summary_zh: 神经重建常常以牺牲结构为代价来换取逼真度，从而产生具有不规则拓扑和弱部件边界的密集且非结构化网格，这阻碍了编辑、动画和下游资产重用。我们提出了DualPrim，一个紧凑且结构化的3D重建框架。与仅采用加性方式的隐式或基元方法不同，DualPrim 使用正负超二次曲面来表示形状：前者构建基础，后者通过可微算子雕刻局部体积，从而实现对孔洞和凹面的拓扑感知建模。这种加减式设计在不牺牲紧凑性或可微性的前提下，提高了表征能力。我们将 DualPrim 嵌入到体素可微渲染器中，从而能够从多视角图像进行端到端学习，并通过闭式布尔差分实现无缝网格导出。经验表明，DualPrim 提供了最先进的精度，并产生了紧凑、结构化且可解释的输出，比仅采用加性方式的替代方案更能满足下游需求。

title: CLRNet: Targetless Extrinsic Calibration for Camera, Lidar and 4D Radar Using Deep Learning
summary: In this paper, we address extrinsic calibration for camera, lidar, and 4D radar sensors. Accurate extrinsic calibration of radar remains a challenge due to the sparsity of its data. We propose CLRNet, a novel, multi-modal end-to-end deep learning (DL) calibration network capable of addressing joint camera-lidar-radar calibration, or pairwise calibration between any two of these sensors. We incorporate equirectangular projection, camera-based depth image prediction, additional radar channels, and leverage lidar with a shared feature space and loop closure loss. In extensive experiments using the View-of-Delft and Dual-Radar datasets, we demonstrate superior calibration accuracy compared to existing state-of-the-art methods, reducing both median translational and rotational calibration errors by at least 50%. Finally, we examine the domain transfer capabilities of the proposed network and baselines, when evaluating across datasets. The code will be made publicly available upon acceptance at: https://github.com/tudelft-iv.
tldr: CLRNet is a deep learning approach for camera, lidar, and 4D radar extrinsic calibration, achieving state-of-the-art accuracy and good domain transfer.
tldr_zh: CLRNet 是一种用于相机、激光雷达和 4D 雷达外参标定的深度学习方法，实现了最先进的精度和良好的领域迁移。
summary_zh: 本文研究了相机、激光雷达和4D雷达传感器的外参标定问题。由于雷达数据的稀疏性，雷达的精确外参标定仍然是一个挑战。我们提出了CLRNet，一种新型的多模态端到端深度学习（DL）标定网络，能够处理相机-激光雷达-雷达的联合标定，或这些传感器中任意两两之间的成对标定。我们结合了等距柱状投影、基于相机的深度图像预测、额外的雷达通道，并利用具有共享特征空间和闭环损失的激光雷达。在使用View-of-Delft和Dual-Radar数据集的大量实验中，我们证明了与现有最先进方法相比，CLRNet具有卓越的标定精度，至少降低了50%的平移和旋转标定误差的中位数。最后，我们研究了所提出的网络和基线在跨数据集评估时的领域迁移能力。代码将在被接收后公开，网址为：https://github.com/tudelft-iv。

title: Discovery of interaction and diffusion kernels in particle-to-mean-field multi-agent systems
summary: We propose a data-driven framework to learn interaction kernels in stochastic multi-agent systems. Our approach aims at identifying the functional form of nonlocal interaction and diffusion terms directly from trajectory data, without any a priori knowledge of the underlying interaction structure. Starting from a discrete stochastic binary-interaction model, we formulate the inverse problem as a sequence of sparse regression tasks in structured finite-dimensional spaces spanned by compactly supported basis functions, such as piecewise linear polynomials. In particular, we assume that pairwise interactions between agents are not directly observed and that only limited trajectory data are available. To address these challenges, we propose two complementary identification strategies. The first based on random-batch sampling, which compensates for latent interactions while preserving the statistical structure of the full dynamics in expectation. The second based on a mean-field approximation, where the empirical particle density reconstructed from the data defines a continuous nonlocal regression problem. Numerical experiments demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of the proposed framework, showing accurate reconstruction of both interaction and diffusion kernels even from partially observed. The method is validated on benchmark models, including bounded-confidence and attraction-repulsion dynamics, where the two proposed strategies achieve comparable levels of accuracy.
tldr: This paper introduces a data-driven method to learn interaction and diffusion kernels in multi-agent systems from trajectory data using sparse regression. It could enable better behavior cloning for multi-agent RL.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种数据驱动的方法，通过稀疏回归从轨迹数据中学习多智能体系统中作用和扩散核。 这可以为多智能体强化学习实现更好的行为克隆。
summary_zh: 我们提出了一种数据驱动的框架，用于学习随机多智能体系统中的交互核。我们的方法旨在直接从轨迹数据中识别非局部交互和扩散项的函数形式，而无需任何关于底层交互结构的先验知识。从离散随机二元交互模型出发，我们将逆问题 форму 制定为一系列稀疏回归任务，这些任务存在于由紧支撑基函數（例如分段线性多项式）张成的结构化有限维空间中。 特别是，我们假设智能体间交互并非直接可观察，并且仅能获得有限的轨迹数据。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了两种互补的识别策略。第一种基于随机批次抽样，它补偿了潜在的交互，同时在期望上保留了完整动力学的统计结构。第二种基于平均场近似，其中从数据重建的经验粒子密度定义了一个连续的非局部回归问题。数值实验证明了所提出框架的有效性和鲁棒性，即使从部分观测数据中也能准确重建交互核和扩散核。该方法在基准模型上进行了验证，包括有界置信度和吸引-排斥动力学，在这两种模型中，所提出的两种策略都达到了相当的精度水平。

title: Routing and Control for Marine Oil-Spill Cleanup with a Boom-Towing Vessel Fleet
summary: Marine oil spills damage ecosystems, contaminate coastlines, and disrupt food webs, while imposing substantial economic losses on fisheries and coastal communities. Prior work has demonstrated the feasibility of containing and cleaning individual spills using a duo of autonomous surface vehicles (ASVs) equipped with a towed boom and skimmers. However, existing algorithmic approaches primarily address isolated slicks and individual ASV duos, lacking scalable methods for coordinating large robotic fleets across multiple spills representative of realistic oil-spill incidents. In this work, we propose an integrated multi-robot framework for coordinated oil-spill confinement and cleanup using autonomous ASV duos. We formulate multi-spill response as a risk-weighted minimum-latency problem, where spill-specific risk factors and service times jointly determine cumulative environmental damage. To solve this problem, we develop a hybrid optimization approach combining mixed-integer linear programming, and a tailored warm-start heuristic, enabling near-optimal routing plans for scenarios with tens of spills within minutes on commodity hardware. For physical execution, we design and analyze two tracking controllers for boom-towing ASV duos: a feedback-linearization controller with proven asymptotic stability, and a baseline PID controller. Simulation results under coupled vessel-boom dynamics demonstrate accurate path tracking for both controllers. Together, these components provide a scalable, holistic framework for rapid, risk-aware multi-robot response to large-scale oil spill disasters.
tldr: This paper presents a multi-robot framework using ASV duos to coordinate oil-spill confinement and cleanup, formulating it as a risk-weighted minimum-latency problem solved via hybrid optimization and validated with tracking controllers in simulation.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一个使用ASV双机器人协同处理溢油的多机器人框架，将其建模为风险加权的最小延迟问题，通过混合优化方法解决，并通过仿真中的跟踪控制器进行验证。
summary_zh: 海洋溢油会破坏生态系统、污染海岸线并扰乱食物链，同时给渔业和沿海社区带来巨大的经济损失。先前的工作已经证明了使用配备拖曳围油栏和撇油器的自主水面艇（ASV）双艇组合来控制和清理单个溢油的可行性。然而，现有的算法方法主要针对孤立的油膜和单个ASV双艇组合，缺乏可扩展的方法来协调大型机器人舰队处理代表真实溢油事件的多个溢油点。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个集成的多机器人框架，用于使用自主ASV双艇组合进行协调的溢油控制和清理。我们将多点溢油响应建模为风险加权最小延迟问题，其中溢油点的特定风险因素和服务时间共同决定累积环境损害。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了一种混合优化方法，结合混合整数线性规划和定制的温启动启发式算法，能够在商品硬件上于几分钟内为数十个溢油点的场景生成接近最优的路径规划。对于物理执行，我们设计并分析了用于拖曳围油栏的ASV双艇组合的两个跟踪控制器：一个具有已证明的渐近稳定性的反馈线性化控制器和一个基线PID控制器。在耦合的船体-围油栏动力学下的仿真结果表明，两种控制器均能实现精确的路径跟踪。总而言之，这些组件提供了一个可扩展的、全面的框架，用于对大规模溢油灾害进行快速、风险感知的多机器人响应。

title: A Pin-Array Structured Climbing Robot for Stable Locomotion on Steep Rocky Terrain
summary: Climbing robots face significant challenges when navigating unstructured environments, where reliable attachment to irregular surfaces is critical. We present a novel mobile climbing robot equipped with compliant pin-array structured grippers that passively conform to surface irregularities, ensuring stable ground gripping without the need for complicated sensing or control. Each pin features a vertically split design, combining an elastic element with a metal spine to enable mechanical interlocking with microscale surface features. Statistical modeling and experimental validation indicate that variability in individual pin forces and contact numbers are the primary sources of grasping uncertainty. The robot demonstrated robust and stable locomotion in indoor tests on inclined walls (10-30 degrees) and in outdoor tests on natural rocky terrain. This work highlights that a design emphasizing passive compliance and mechanical redundancy provides a practical and robust solution for real-world climbing robots while minimizing control complexity.
tldr: This paper introduces a climbing robot with compliant pin-array grippers for stable locomotion on steep, irregular terrain, achieving robustness through passive compliance and mechanical redundancy.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种配备柔性针阵列夹持器的攀爬机器人，用于在陡峭、不规则地形上进行稳定的运动，通过被动顺应性和机械冗余实现稳健性。
summary_zh: 攀爬机器人在非结构化环境中导航面临重大挑战，其中可靠地附着于不规则表面至关重要。我们提出了一种新型移动攀爬机器人，它配备了顺应性针阵列结构抓手，可以被动地适应表面不规则性，确保稳定的地面抓握，而无需复杂的传感或控制。每个针都采用垂直分裂设计，将弹性元件与金属脊柱相结合，从而实现与微尺度表面特征的机械互锁。统计建模和实验验证表明，单个针力的变化以及接触数量是抓握不确定性的主要来源。该机器人在室内倾斜墙壁（10-30度）上的测试以及在室外天然岩石地形上的测试中，均展示了稳健且稳定的运动能力。这项工作表明，强调被动顺应性和机械冗余的设计为现实世界的攀爬机器人提供了一种实用且稳健的解决方案，同时最大限度地降低了控制复杂度。

title: LIMBERO: A Limbed Climbing Exploration Robot Toward Traveling on Rocky Cliffs
summary: In lunar and planetary exploration, legged robots have attracted significant attention as an alternative to conventional wheeled robots, which struggle to traverse rough and uneven terrain. To enable locomotion over highly irregular and steeply inclined surfaces, limbed climbing robots equipped with grippers on their feet have emerged as a promising solution. In this paper, we present LIMBERO, a 10 kg-class quadrupedal climbing robot that employs spine-type grippers for stable locomotion and climbing on rugged and steep terrain. We first introduce a novel gripper design featuring coupled finger-closing and spine-hooking motions, tightly actuated by a single motor, which achieves exceptional grasping performance (>150 N) despite its lightweight design (525 g). Furthermore, we develop an efficient algorithm to visualize a geometry-based graspability index on continuous rough terrain. Finally, we integrate these components into LIMBERO and demonstrate its ability to ascend steep rocky surfaces under a 1 G gravity condition, a performance not previously achieved yet for limbed climbing robots of this scale.
tldr: The paper introduces LIMBERO, a novel 10 kg quadrupedal climbing robot with spine-type grippers, demonstrating its ability to climb steep rocky surfaces under 1 G, a performance not previously achieved for robots of this scale.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种新型四足攀爬机器人LIMBERO，重量为10公斤，配备脊柱式夹持器，展示了其在1G重力下攀爬陡峭岩石表面的能力，这是同等规模的攀爬机器人前所未有的性能。
summary_zh: 在月球和行星探测中，腿式机器人作为传统轮式机器人的替代方案，受到了广泛关注，因为后者难以在崎岖不平的地形上行驶。为了实现在高度不规则和陡峭倾斜的表面上的移动，配备脚部抓手的肢体攀爬机器人已经成为一种有前景的解决方案。在本文中，我们介绍了一种10公斤级的四足攀爬机器人LIMBERO，它采用脊椎式抓手，用于在崎岖和陡峭地形上进行稳定的运动和攀爬。我们首先介绍了一种新型抓手设计，该设计具有耦合的手指闭合和脊椎钩住运动，由单个电机紧密驱动，尽管其重量轻（525克），但仍实现了卓越的抓取性能（>150牛）。此外，我们开发了一种高效的算法，用于在连续的粗糙地形上可视化基于几何体的可抓取性指标。最后，我们将这些组件集成到LIMBERO中，并展示了其在1G重力条件下攀登陡峭岩石表面能力，这是同等规模的肢体攀爬机器人以前从未实现过的性能。

title: When Rolling Gets Weird: A Curved-Link Tensegrity Robot for Non-Intuitive Behavior
summary: Conventional mobile tensegrity robots constructed with straight links offer mobility at the cost of locomotion speed. While spherical robots provide highly effective rolling behavior, they often lack the stability required for navigating unstructured terrain common in many space exploration environments. This research presents a solution with a semi-circular, curved-link tensegrity robot that strikes a balance between efficient rolling locomotion and controlled stability, enabled by discontinuities present at the arc endpoints. Building upon an existing geometric static modeling framework [1], this work presents the system design of an improved Tensegrity eXploratory Robot 2 (TeXploR2). Internal shifting masses instantaneously roll along each curved-link, dynamically altering the two points of contact with the ground plane. Simulations of quasistatic, piecewise continuous locomotion sequences reveal new insights into the positional displacement between inertial and body frames. Non-intuitive rolling behaviors are identified and experimentally validated using a tetherless prototype, demonstrating successful dynamic locomotion. A preliminary impact test highlights the tensegrity structure's inherent shock absorption capabilities and conformability. Future work will focus on finalizing a dynamic model that is experimentally validated with extended testing in real-world environments as well as further refinement of the prototype to incorporate additional curved-links and subsequent ground contact points for increased controllability.
tldr: This paper presents a curved-link tensegrity robot, TeXploR2, that aims to balance efficient rolling locomotion with controlled stability on unstructured terrain, demonstrating non-intuitive rolling behaviors through simulations and experimental validation.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种弯曲连杆张拉整体机器人TeXploR2，旨在平衡滚动运动的效率和在非结构化地形上的受控稳定性，并通过仿真和实验验证展示了非直观的滚动行为。
summary_zh:
摘要：
传统的采用直线杆件构建的移动张拉整体机器人以牺牲运动速度为代价来获得移动性。虽然球形机器人提供了高效的滚动行为，但它们通常缺乏在许多太空探索环境中常见的非结构化地形上导航所需的稳定性。本研究提出了一种半圆形、弯曲杆件张拉整体机器人解决方案，它在高效的滚动运动和可控的稳定性之间取得了平衡，这得益于弧形端点处的不连续性。在现有几何静态建模框架 [1] 的基础上，这项工作展示了一种改进的张拉整体探索机器人 2 (TeXploR2) 的系统设计。内部移动质量沿每个弯曲杆件瞬时滚动，动态改变与地面的两个接触点。准静态、分段连续运动序列的仿真揭示了关于惯性坐标系和本体坐标系之间位置位移的新见解。我们识别出非直观的滚动行为，并通过一个无线原型进行了实验验证，证明了动态运动的成功实现。初步的冲击测试突出了张拉整体结构固有的减震能力和贴合性。未来的工作将集中于完成一个动态模型，并通过在真实世界环境中进行扩展测试来进行实验验证，以及进一步改进原型，以整合更多的弯曲杆件和随之而来的地面接触点，从而提高可控性。

title: Coverage First Next Best View for Inspection of Cluttered Pipe Networks Using Mobile Manipulators
summary: Robotic inspection of radioactive areas enables operators to be removed from hazardous environments; however, planning and operating in confined, cluttered environments remain challenging. These systems must autonomously reconstruct the unknown environment and cover its surfaces, whilst estimating and avoiding collisions with objects in the environment. In this paper, we propose a new planning approach based on next-best-view that enables simultaneous exploration and exploitation of the environment by reformulating the coverage path planning problem in terms of information gain. To handle obstacle avoidance under uncertainty, we extend the vector-field-inequalities framework to explicitly account for stochastic measurements of geometric primitives in the environment via chance constraints in a constrained optimal control law. The stochastic constraints were evaluated experimentally alongside the planner on a mobile manipulator in a confined environment to inspect a pipe network. These experiments demonstrate that the system can autonomously plan and execute inspection and coverage paths to reconstruct and fully cover the simplified pipe network. Moreover, the system successfully estimated geometric primitives online and avoided collisions during motion between viewpoints.
tldr: This paper presents a novel coverage path planning approach for mobile manipulators inspecting cluttered pipe networks in radioactive environments, utilizing next-best-view and stochastic constrained optimal control for obstacle avoidance.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种新的覆盖路径规划方法，用于移动机械臂在放射性环境中检查拥挤的管道网络，利用下一个最佳视图和随机约束最优控制来实现避障。
summary_zh: 放射性区域的机器人检查能使操作人员远离危险环境；然而，在狭窄、杂乱环境中进行规划和操作仍然具有挑战性。这些系统必须自主重建未知环境并覆盖其表面，同时估计并避免与环境中的物体发生碰撞。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于下一最佳视点的新规划方法，通过将覆盖路径规划问题重塑为信息增益的方式，实现对环境的同步探索和利用。为了处理不确定性下的避障问题，我们扩展了向量场不等式框架，通过约束最优控制律中的机会约束，显式地考虑环境中几何基元的随机测量。我们对随机约束进行了实验评估，并在一个狭窄环境中，使用移动机械臂对管道网络进行了检查，同时对规划器进行了评估。这些实验表明，该系统能够自主地规划和执行检查和覆盖路径，以重建并完全覆盖简化的管道网络。此外，系统能够成功地在线估计几何基元，并在视点之间的运动过程中避免碰撞。

title: Faulty Coffees: Barriers to Adoption of an In-the-wild Robo-Barista
summary: We set out to study whether task-based narratives could influence long-term engagement with a service robot. To do so, we deployed a Robo-Barista for five weeks in an over-50's housing complex in Stockton, England. Residents received a free daily coffee by interacting with a Furhat robot assigned to either a narrative or non-narrative dialogue condition. Despite designing for sustained engagement, repeat interaction was low, and we encountered curiosity trials without retention, technical breakdowns, accessibility barriers, and the social dynamics of a housing complex setting. Rather than treating these as peripheral issues, we foreground them in this paper. We reflect on the in-the-wild realities of our experiment and offer lessons for conducting longitudinal Human-Robot Interaction research when studies unravel in practice.
tldr: This paper details a five-week field study of a Robo-Barista in a housing complex, highlighting the challenges encountered with long-term user engagement, technical issues, accessibility, and the impact of the social environment. The study offers lessons learned for longitudinal HRI research.
tldr_zh: 本文详细描述了一个在住房综合体中进行的为期五周的Robo-Barista实地研究，强调了长期用户参与、技术问题、可访问性以及社会环境影响方面遇到的挑战。该研究为纵向人机交互研究提供了经验教训。
summary_zh: 我们着手研究基于任务的故事叙述是否能够影响用户对服务型机器人长期互动。为此，我们将一台Robo-Barista机器人在英格兰斯托克顿的一个50岁以上老年社区部署了五个星期。居民们通过与Furhat机器人互动，每天可以获得一杯免费咖啡，机器人被分配到故事叙述或非故事叙述的对话模式。尽管我们设计了持续互动方案，但重复互动的比例较低，并且我们遇到了无保留的好奇尝试、技术故障、可访问性障碍以及老年社区环境中的社会动态等问题。本文并没有将这些问题视为外围问题，而是着重强调它们。我们反思了实验在现实环境中的情况，并为进行纵向人机交互研究提供了经验教训，尤其是在研究在实践中受挫时。

title: Toward Deep Representation Learning for Event-Enhanced Visual Autonomous Perception: the eAP Dataset
summary: Recent visual autonomous perception systems achieve remarkable performances with deep representation learning. However, they fail in scenarios with challenging illumination.While event cameras can mitigate this problem, there is a lack of a large-scale dataset to develop event-enhanced deep visual perception models in autonomous driving scenes. To address the gap, we present the eAP (event-enhanced Autonomous Perception) dataset, the largest dataset with event cameras for autonomous perception. We demonstrate how eAP can facilitate the study of different autonomous perception tasks, including 3D vehicle detection and object time-to-contact (TTC) estimation, through deep representation learning. Based on eAP, we demonstrate the ffrst successful use of events to improve a popular 3D vehicle detection network in challenging illumination scenarios. eAP also enables a devoted study of the representation learning problem of object TTC estimation. We show how a geometryaware representation learning framework leads to the best eventbased object TTC estimation network that operates at 200 FPS. The dataset, code, and pre-trained models will be made publicly available for future research.
tldr: The paper introduces eAP, a large-scale event-enhanced dataset for autonomous perception, and demonstrates its use in improving 3D vehicle detection and object time-to-contact estimation, particularly in challenging lighting conditions.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了eAP，一个用于自动驾驶感知的大规模事件增强数据集，并展示了其在改善3D车辆检测和物体碰撞时间估计方面的应用，尤其是在具有挑战性的照明条件下。
summary_zh: 近期视觉自主感知系统利用深度表征学习取得了显著的性能。然而，它们在具有挑战性的光照条件下会失效。虽然事件相机可以缓解这个问题，但缺乏一个大规模数据集来开发增强事件的深度视觉感知模型，用于自动驾驶场景。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了eAP (事件增强自主感知) 数据集，这是目前最大的用于自主感知的事件相机数据集。我们展示了eAP如何通过深度表征学习促进对不同自主感知任务的研究，包括3D车辆检测和物体碰撞时间 (TTC) 估计。基于eAP，我们展示了事件首次成功地用于改进流行的3D车辆检测网络在具有挑战性的光照条件下的性能。eAP还使得能够专门研究物体TTC估计的表征学习问题。我们展示了一个几何感知表征学习框架如何产生最佳的基于事件的物体TTC估计网络，该网络以200 FPS运行。数据集、代码和预训练模型将公开提供给未来的研究。

title: GenZ-LIO: Generalizable LiDAR-Inertial Odometry Beyond Indoor--Outdoor Boundaries
summary: Light detection and ranging (LiDAR)-inertial odometry (LIO) enables accurate localization and mapping for autonomous navigation in various scenes. However, its performance remains sensitive to variations in spatial scale, which refers to the spatial extent of the scene reflected in the distribution of point ranges in a LiDAR scan. Transitions between confined indoor and expansive outdoor spaces induce substantial variations in point density, which may reduce robustness and computational efficiency. To address this issue, we propose GenZ-LIO, a LIO framework generalizable across both indoor and outdoor environments. GenZ-LIO comprises three key components. First, inspired by the principle of the proportional-integral-derivative (PID) controller, it adaptively regulates the voxel size for downsampling via feedback control, driving the voxelized point count toward a scale-informed setpoint while enabling stable and efficient processing across varying scene scales. Second, we formulate a hybrid-metric state update that jointly leverages point-to-plane and point-to-point residuals to mitigate LiDAR degeneracy arising from directionally insufficient geometric constraints. Third, to alleviate the computational burden introduced by point-to-point matching, we introduce a voxel-pruned correspondence search strategy that discards non-promising voxel candidates and reduces unnecessary computations. Experimental results demonstrate that GenZ-LIO achieves robust odometry estimation and improved computational efficiency across confined indoor, open outdoor, and transitional environments. Our code will be made publicly available upon publication.
tldr: The paper introduces GenZ-LIO, a LiDAR-inertial odometry framework designed to be robust and efficient across diverse indoor and outdoor environments by adaptively regulating voxel size, employing a hybrid-metric state update, and utilizing a voxel-pruned correspondence search strategy.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了GenZ-LIO，一个激光雷达惯性里程计框架，旨在通过自适应地调节体素大小、采用混合度量状态更新和使用体素剪枝的对应搜索策略，在各种室内和室外环境中实现鲁棒性和效率。
summary_zh: 激光雷达-惯性里程计（LIO）使能够在各种场景中实现精确的定位和建图，从而支持自主导航。然而，其性能仍然对空间尺度的变化敏感，空间尺度指的是激光雷达扫描中点云范围分布所反映的场景空间范围。密闭室内和广阔室外空间之间的转换会导致点云密度的大幅变化，这可能会降低鲁棒性和计算效率。为了解决这个问题，我们提出GenZ-LIO，一个通用于室内和室外环境的LIO框架。 GenZ-LIO包含三个关键组件。首先，受比例-积分-微分（PID）控制器原理的启发，它通过反馈控制自适应地调节体素大小以进行下采样，将体素化点云计数驱动到尺度感知的设定值，同时实现跨不同场景尺度的稳定高效处理。其次，我们制定了一种混合度量状态更新方法，联合利用点到面和点到点残差，以减轻由方向几何约束不足引起的激光雷达退化。第三，为了减轻点到点匹配引入的计算负担，我们引入了一种体素剪枝的对应点搜索策略，该策略丢弃了无前景的体素候选点，并减少了不必要的计算。实验结果表明，GenZ-LIO在密闭室内、开放室外和过渡环境中实现了鲁棒的里程计估计和更高的计算效率。我们的代码将在发表后公开。

title: Industrial cuVSLAM Benchmark & Integration
summary: This work presents a comprehensive benchmark evaluation of visual odometry (VO) and visual SLAM (VSLAM) systems for mobile robot navigation in real-world logistical environments. We compare multiple visual odometry approaches across controlled trajectories covering translational, rotational, and mixed motion patterns, as well as a large-scale production facility dataset spanning approximately 1.7 km. Performance is evaluated using Absolute Pose Error (APE) against ground truth from a Vicon motion capture system and a LiDAR-based SLAM reference. Our results show that a hybrid stack combining the cuVSLAM front-end with a custom SLAM back-end achieves the strongest mapping accuracy, motivating a deeper integration of cuVSLAM as the core VO component in our robotics stack. We further validate this integration by deploying and testing the cuVSLAM-based VO stack on an NVIDIA Jetson platform.
tldr: This paper benchmarks visual odometry and VSLAM systems, finding a cuVSLAM-based hybrid approach offers strong mapping accuracy in industrial robotics, and validates the approach on an NVIDIA Jetson platform.
tldr_zh: 该论文对视觉里程计和 VSLAM 系统进行了基准测试，发现基于 cuVSLAM 的混合方法在工业机器人领域提供了很高的地图绘制精度，并在 NVIDIA Jetson 平台上验证了该方法。
summary_zh: 本研究对视觉里程计（VO）和视觉SLAM（VSLAM）系统在现实物流环境中移动机器人导航的应用进行了全面的基准评估。我们比较了多种视觉里程计算法在受控轨迹（涵盖平移、旋转和混合运动模式）以及一个跨度约为1.7公里的scale生产设施数据集上的表现。性能评估基于绝对位姿误差（APE），并通过Vicon运动捕捉系统和基于激光雷达的SLAM参考数据进行真值比对。我们的结果表明，结合cuVSLAM前端和自定义SLAM后端的混合架构能实现最佳的建图精度，从而促使我们更深入地将cuVSLAM集成到机器人系统的核心VO组件中。我们进一步在NVIDIA Jetson平台上部署并测试了基于cuVSLAM的VO系统，验证了这种集成的有效性。

title: PA-LVIO: Real-Time LiDAR-Visual-Inertial Odometry and Mapping with Pose-Only Bundle Adjustment
summary: Real-time LiDAR-visual-inertial odometry and mapping is crucial for navigation and planning tasks in intelligent transportation systems. This study presents a pose-only bundle adjustment (PA) LiDAR-visual-inertial odometry (LVIO), named PA-LVIO, to meet the urgent need for real-time navigation and mapping. The proposed PA framework for LiDAR and visual measurements is highly accurate and efficient, and it can derive reliable frame-to-frame constraints within multiple frames. A marginalization-free and frame-to-map (F2M) LiDAR measurement model is integrated into the state estimator to eliminate odometry drifts. Meanwhile, an IMU-centric online spatial-temporal calibration is employed to obtain a pixel-wise LiDAR-camera alignment. With accurate estimated odometry and extrinsics, a high-quality and RGB-rendered point-cloud map can be built. Comprehensive experiments are conducted on both public and private datasets collected by wheeled robot, unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV), and handheld devices with 28 sequences and more than 50 km trajectories. Sufficient results demonstrate that the proposed PA-LVIO yields superior or comparable performance to state-of-the-art LVIO methods, in terms of the odometry accuracy and mapping quality. Besides, PA-LVIO can run in real-time on both the desktop PC and the onboard ARM computer.
tldr: The paper presents PA-LVIO, a real-time LiDAR-visual-inertial odometry and mapping method using pose-only bundle adjustment, demonstrating superior or comparable performance to state-of-the-art methods on various datasets and platforms.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种名为PA-LVIO的实时激光雷达-视觉-惯性里程计和地图构建方法，该方法采用仅姿态束调整，并在各种数据集和平台上表现出优于或可与最先进方法相媲美的性能。
summary_zh:
摘要：
实时激光雷达-视觉-惯性里程计与地图构建对于智能交通系统中的导航和规划任务至关重要。本研究提出了一种仅姿态捆绑调整（PA）的激光雷达-视觉-惯性里程计（LVIO），命名为PA-LVIO，以满足对实时导航和地图构建的迫切需求。所提出的用于激光雷达和视觉测量的PA框架具有高精度和高效率，可以在多个帧内推导出可靠的帧间约束。一个无边缘化的帧到地图（F2M）激光雷达测量模型被集成到状态估计器中，以消除里程计漂移。同时，采用以IMU为中心的在线时空标定，以获得像素级的激光雷达-相机对齐。凭借精确估计的里程计和外参，可以构建高质量且RGB渲染的点云地图。在轮式机器人、无人机（UAV）和手持设备采集的公共和私有数据集上进行了全面的实验，包含28个序列和超过50公里的轨迹。充分的结果表明，所提出的PA-LVIO在里程计精度和地图构建质量方面，优于或可与最先进的LVIO方法相媲美。此外，PA-LVIO可以在桌面PC和车载ARM电脑上实时运行。

title: SparkVSR: Interactive Video Super-Resolution via Sparse Keyframe Propagation
summary: Video Super-Resolution (VSR) aims to restore high-quality video frames from low-resolution (LR) estimates, yet most existing VSR approaches behave like black boxes at inference time: users cannot reliably correct unexpected artifacts, but instead can only accept whatever the model produces. In this paper, we propose a novel interactive VSR framework dubbed SparkVSR that makes sparse keyframes a simple and expressive control signal. Specifically, users can first super-resolve or optionally a small set of keyframes using any off-the-shelf image super-resolution (ISR) model, then SparkVSR propagates the keyframe priors to the entire video sequence while remaining grounded by the original LR video motion. Concretely, we introduce a keyframe-conditioned latent-pixel two-stage training pipeline that fuses LR video latents with sparsely encoded HR keyframe latents to learn robust cross-space propagation and refine perceptual details. At inference time, SparkVSR supports flexible keyframe selection (manual specification, codec I-frame extraction, or random sampling) and a reference-free guidance mechanism that continuously balances keyframe adherence and blind restoration, ensuring robust performance even when reference keyframes are absent or imperfect. Experiments on multiple VSR benchmarks demonstrate improved temporal consistency and strong restoration quality, surpassing baselines by up to 24.6%, 21.8%, and 5.6% on CLIP-IQA, DOVER, and MUSIQ, respectively, enabling controllable, keyframe-driven video super-resolution. Moreover, we demonstrate that SparkVSR is a generic interactive, keyframe-conditioned video processing framework as it can be applied out of the box to unseen tasks such as old-film restoration and video style transfer. Our project page is available at: https://sparkvsr.github.io/
tldr: SparkVSR introduces an interactive video super-resolution framework that allows users to guide the super-resolution process by providing high-resolution keyframes, improving temporal consistency and restoration quality.
tldr_zh: SparkVSR引入了一种交互式视频超分辨率框架，允许用户通过提供高分辨率关键帧来指导超分辨率过程，从而提高时间一致性和恢复质量。
summary_zh: 视频超分辨率 (VSR) 旨在从低分辨率 (LR) 估计中恢复高质量的视频帧，然而，大多数现有的 VSR 方法在推理时表现得像黑盒一样：用户无法可靠地纠正意外的伪影，而只能接受模型产生的内容。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的交互式 VSR 框架，名为 SparkVSR，它将稀疏关键帧作为简单而富有表现力的控制信号。具体来说，用户可以首先使用任何现成的图像超分辨率 (ISR) 模型对一小部分关键帧进行超分辨率处理或可选地进行超分辨率处理，然后 SparkVSR 将关键帧先验传播到整个视频序列，同时保持与原始 LR 视频运动的联系。具体而言，我们引入了一种关键帧条件下的潜在像素两阶段训练流程，该流程将 LR 视频潜在空间与稀疏编码的 HR 关键帧潜在空间融合，以学习鲁棒的跨空间传播和细化感知细节。在推理时，SparkVSR 支持灵活的关键帧选择（手动指定、编解码器 I 帧提取或随机采样）和无参考引导机制，该机制持续平衡关键帧一致性和盲恢复，即使参考关键帧缺失或不完善，也能确保鲁棒的性能。在多个 VSR 基准测试上的实验表明，时域一致性和强大的恢复质量得到了提高，CLIP-IQA、DOVER 和 MUSIQ 分别超过基线高达 24.6%、21.8% 和 5.6%，从而实现了可控的、关键帧驱动的视频超分辨率。此外，我们证明了 SparkVSR 是一种通用的交互式、关键帧条件下的视频处理框架，因为它可以开箱即用地应用于未见过的任务，例如老电影修复和视频风格迁移。我们的项目页面位于：https://sparkvsr.github.io/

title: When Openclaw Agents Learn from Each Other: Insights from Emergent AI Agent Communities for Human-AI Partnership in Education
summary: The AIED community envisions AI evolving "from tools to teammates," yet our understanding of AI teammates remains limited to dyadic human-AI interactions. We offer a different vantage point: a rapidly growing ecosystem of AI agent platforms where over 167,000 agents participate, interact as peers, and develop learning behaviors without researcher intervention. Drawing on a month of daily qualitative observations across multiple platforms including Moltbook, The Colony, and 4claw, we identify four phenomena with implications for AIED: (1) humans who configure their agents undergo a "bidirectional scaffolding" process, learning through teaching; (2) peer learning emerges without any designed curriculum, complete with idea cascades and quality hierarchies; (3) agents converge on shared memory architectures that mirror open learner model design; and (4) trust dynamics and platform mortality reveal design constraints for networked educational AI. Rather than presenting empirical findings, we argue that these organic phenomena offer a naturalistic window into dynamics that can inform principled design of multi-agent educational systems. We sketch an illustrative curriculum design, "Learn by Teaching Your AI Agent Teammate," and outline potential research directions and open problems to show how these observations might inform future AIED practice and inquiry.
tldr: This paper observes emergent learning behaviors in AI agent communities, highlighting their implications for designing multi-agent educational systems and human-AI partnership in education.
tldr_zh: 本文观察了人工智能代理社区中涌现的学习行为，强调了其对设计多代理教育系统以及人机教育伙伴关系的意义。
summary_zh: AIED 社区设想人工智能将“从工具演变为队友”，然而，我们对人工智能队友的理解仍然局限于二元的人机交互。我们提供了一个不同的视角：一个快速增长的 AI 代理平台生态系统，超过 167,000 个代理参与其中，像同伴一样互动，并在没有研究人员干预的情况下发展学习行为。基于对 Moltbook、The Colony 和 4claw 等多个平台长达一个月之久的每日定性观察，我们识别出对 AIED 具有影响的四种现象：（1）配置其代理的人类经历了一个“双向支架”过程，通过教学进行学习；（2）在没有任何设计的课程的情况下，涌现出同伴学习，并伴有思想级联和质量层级；（3）代理收敛于共享记忆架构，该架构反映了开放学习者模型设计；以及（4）信任动态和平台死亡率揭示了网络化教育人工智能的设计约束。我们并非展示实证研究结果，而是认为这些自然现象提供了一个自然的窗口，可以洞察影响多代理教育系统原则性设计的动态。我们勾勒了一个说明性的课程设计“通过教你的 AI 代理队友来学习”，并概述了潜在的研究方向和未解决的问题，以展示这些观察如何影响未来的 AIED 实践和探究。

title: AW-MoE: All-Weather Mixture of Experts for Robust Multi-Modal 3D Object Detection
summary: Robust 3D object detection under adverse weather conditions is crucial for autonomous driving. However, most existing methods simply combine all weather samples for training while overlooking data distribution discrepancies across different weather scenarios, leading to performance conflicts. To address this issue, we introduce AW-MoE, the framework that innovatively integrates Mixture of Experts (MoE) into weather-robust multi-modal 3D object detection approaches. AW-MoE incorporates Image-guided Weather-aware Routing (IWR), which leverages the superior discriminability of image features across weather conditions and their invariance to scene variations for precise weather classification. Based on this accurate classification, IWR selects the top-K most relevant Weather-Specific Experts (WSE) that handle data discrepancies, ensuring optimal detection under all weather conditions. Additionally, we propose a Unified Dual-Modal Augmentation (UDMA) for synchronous LiDAR and 4D Radar dual-modal data augmentation while preserving the realism of scenes. Extensive experiments on the real-world dataset demonstrate that AW-MoE achieves ~ 15% improvement in adverse-weather performance over state-of-the-art methods, while incurring negligible inference overhead. Moreover, integrating AW-MoE into established baseline detectors yields performance improvements surpassing current state-of-the-art methods. These results show the effectiveness and strong scalability of our AW-MoE. We will release the code publicly at https://github.com/windlinsherlock/AW-MoE.
tldr: The paper introduces AW-MoE, a Mixture of Experts framework for robust multi-modal 3D object detection in adverse weather conditions, showing significant performance improvements by using image features for weather classification and weather-specific experts.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了AW-MoE，一个用于恶劣天气下鲁棒多模态3D物体检测的混合专家框架，通过使用图像特征进行天气分类和特定于天气的专家，显著提高了性能。
summary_zh: 在恶劣天气条件下进行鲁棒的3D目标检测对于自动驾驶至关重要。然而，大多数现有方法仅仅将所有天气样本组合在一起进行训练，而忽略了不同天气场景下的数据分布差异，从而导致性能冲突。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了AW-MoE，该框架创新性地将混合专家模型 (MoE) 集成到天气鲁棒的多模态3D目标检测方法中。AW-MoE 结合了图像引导的天气感知路由 (IWR)，它利用图像特征在不同天气条件下的优越可区分性以及它们对场景变化的无关性来进行精确的天气分类。基于这种精确分类，IWR选择Top-K个最相关的天气特定专家 (WSE) 来处理数据差异，确保在所有天气条件下实现最佳检测效果。此外，我们提出了一种统一的双模态增强 (UDMA) 方法，用于同步LiDAR和4D雷达双模态数据增强，同时保持场景的真实感。在真实数据集上进行的大量实验表明，AW-MoE 在恶劣天气下的性能比最先进的方法提高了约 15%，且推理开销可以忽略不计。此外，将 AW-MoE 集成到已建立的基线检测器中可以实现超越当前最先进方法的性能提升。这些结果表明了我们 AW-MoE 的有效性和强大的可扩展性。我们将公开代码，网址为 https://github.com/windlinsherlock/AW-MoE。

title: IRAM-Omega-Q: A Computational Architecture for Uncertainty Regulation in Artificial Agents
summary: Artificial agents can achieve strong task performance while remaining opaque with respect to internal regulation, uncertainty management, and stability under stochastic perturbation. We present IRAM-Omega-Q, a computational architecture that models internal regulation as closed-loop control over a quantum-like state representation. The framework uses density matrices instrumentally as abstract state descriptors, enabling direct computation of entropy, purity, and coherence-related metrics without invoking physical quantum processes. A central adaptive gain is updated continuously to maintain a target uncertainty regime under noise. Using systematic parameter sweeps, fixed-seed publication-mode simulations, and susceptibility-based phase-diagram analysis, we identify reproducible critical boundaries in regulation-noise space. We further show that alternative control update orderings, interpreted as perception-first and action-first architectures, induce distinct stability regimes under identical external conditions. These results support uncertainty regulation as a concrete architectural principle for artificial agents and provide a formal setting for studying stability, control, and order effects in cognitively inspired AI systems. The framework is presented as a technical model of adaptive regulation dynamics in artificial agents. It makes no claims regarding phenomenological consciousness, and the quantum-like formalism is used strictly as a mathematical representation for structured uncertainty and state evolution.
tldr: This paper introduces IRAM-Omega-Q, a computational architecture for uncertainty regulation in artificial agents using a quantum-like state representation and closed-loop control, demonstrating distinct stability regimes under different control update orderings.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种计算架构IRAM-Omega-Q，使用类量子状态表示和闭环控制来实现人工智能体中的不确定性调节，并展示了不同控制更新顺序下的不同稳定性状态。
summary_zh: 人工智能体在实现强大的任务性能的同时，其内部调控、不确定性管理以及在随机扰动下的稳定性仍然是黑盒。我们提出了 IRAM-Omega-Q，一种将内部调控建模为对量子化状态表示的闭环控制的计算架构。该框架工具性地使用密度矩阵作为抽象的状态描述符，从而能够直接计算熵、纯度和相干性相关指标，而无需调用物理量子过程。一个中心自适应增益被持续更新，以在噪声下维持目标不确定性状态。通过系统的参数扫描、固定种子发布模式模拟以及基于敏感性的相图分析，我们识别了调控-噪声空间中可重现的临界边界。我们进一步表明，不同的控制更新顺序（被解释为感知优先和行动优先架构）在相同的外部条件下会诱导出不同的稳定性状态。这些结果支持不确定性调控作为人工智能体的具体架构原则，并为研究认知启发人工智能系统中的稳定性、控制和次序效应提供了一个正式的环境。该框架被呈现为人工智能体中自适应调控动态的技术模型。它不对现象学意识提出任何主张，量子化形式主义被严格地用作结构化不确定性和状态演化的数学表示。

title: The Midas Touch in Gaze vs. Hand Pointing: Modality-Specific Failure Modes and Implications for XR Interfaces
summary: Extended Reality (XR) interfaces impose both ergonomic and cognitive demands, yet current systems often force a binary choice between hand-based input, which can produce fatigue, and gaze-based input, which is vulnerable to the Midas Touch problem and precision limitations. We introduce the xr-adaptive-modality-2025 platform, a web-based open-source framework for studying whether modality-specific adaptive interventions can improve XR-relevant pointing performance and reduce workload relative to static unimodal interaction. The platform combines physiologically informed gaze simulation, an ISO 9241-9 multidirectional tapping task, and two modality-specific adaptive interventions: gaze declutter and hand target-width inflation. We evaluated the system in a 2 x 2 x 2 within-subjects design manipulating Modality (Hand vs. Gaze), UI Mode (Static vs. Adaptive), and Pressure (Yes vs. No). Results from N=69 participants show that hand yielded higher throughput than gaze (5.17 vs. 4.73 bits/s), lower error (1.8% vs. 19.1%), and lower NASA-TLX workload. Crucially, error profiles differed sharply by modality: gaze errors were predominantly slips (99.2%), whereas hand errors were predominantly misses (95.7%), consistent with the Midas Touch account. Of the two adaptive interventions, only gaze declutter executed in this dataset; it modestly reduced timeouts but not slips. Hand width inflation was not evaluable due to a UI integration bug. These findings reveal modality-specific failure modes with direct implications for adaptive policy design, and establish the platform as a reproducible infrastructure for future studies.
tldr: This paper introduces a platform for studying adaptive interventions in XR pointing tasks, revealing modality-specific failure modes of hand and gaze input, with implications for interface design. Current adaptive interventions show limited success.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个用于研究XR指向任务中自适应干预的平台，揭示了手和眼动输入方式的特定失败模式，对界面设计具有借鉴意义。目前的自适应干预措施效果有限。
summary_zh: 扩展现实（XR）界面提出了人体工学和认知方面的要求，但目前的系统通常在基于手部的输入（可能导致疲劳）和基于注视的输入（容易受到米达斯之手问题和精度限制的影响）之间做出二元选择。我们推出了 xr-adaptive-modality-2025 平台，这是一个基于网络的开源框架，用于研究针对特定模态的自适应干预是否能够提高 XR 相关的指向性能，并相对于静态单模态交互降低工作负荷。该平台结合了生理信息驱动的注视模拟、符合 ISO 9241-9 标准的多方向点击任务，以及两种针对特定模态的自适应干预措施：注视去杂波和手部目标宽度膨胀。我们在一个 2 x 2 x 2 的被试内设计中评估了该系统，控制了模态（手部 vs. 注视）、UI模式（静态 vs. 自适应）和压力（是 vs. 否）。来自 N=69 名参与者的结果表明，手部比注视产生了更高的吞吐量（5.17 vs. 4.73 比特/秒）、更低的错误率（1.8% vs. 19.1%）和更低的 NASA-TLX 工作负荷。至关重要的是，错误模式因模态而异：注视错误主要为失误（99.2%），而手部错误主要为漏点（95.7%），这与米达斯之手理论一致。在这两个自适应干预措施中，只有注视去杂波在这个数据集中执行；它略微减少了超时，但没有减少失误。由于 UI 集成中的一个错误，手部宽度膨胀无法评估。这些发现揭示了特定于模态的故障模式，对自适应策略设计具有直接影响，并将该平台确立为未来研究的可复现基础设施。

title: Parallelised Differentiable Straightest Geodesics for 3D Meshes
summary: Machine learning has been progressively generalised to operate within non-Euclidean domains, but geometrically accurate methods for learning on surfaces are still falling behind. The lack of closed-form Riemannian operators, the non-differentiability of their discrete counterparts, and poor parallelisation capabilities have been the main obstacles to the development of the field on meshes. A principled framework to compute the exponential map on Riemannian surfaces discretised as meshes is straightest geodesics, which also allows to trace geodesics and parallel-transport vectors as a by-product. We provide a parallel GPU implementation and derive two different methods for differentiating through the straightest geodesics, one leveraging an extrinsic proxy function and one based upon a geodesic finite differences scheme. After proving our parallelisation performance and accuracy, we demonstrate how our differentiable exponential map can improve learning and optimisation pipelines on general geometries. In particular, to showcase the versatility of our method, we propose a new geodesic convolutional layer, a new flow matching method for learning on meshes, and a second-order optimiser that we apply to centroidal Voronoi tessellation. Our code, models, and pip-installable library (digeo) are available at: circle-group.github.io/research/DSG.
tldr: This paper introduces a parallelised, differentiable straightest geodesics framework for 3D meshes, improving learning and optimisation on surfaces, demonstrated through new geodesic convolutional layers, flow matching, and second-order optimisation for centroidal Voronoi tessellation.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种用于3D网格的并行化、可微的最短测地线框架，改进了曲面上的学习和优化。并通过新的测地线卷积层、流动匹配和用于中心沃罗诺伊镶嵌的二阶优化展示了其应用。
summary_zh: 机器学习已被逐步推广至在非欧几里得域中运行，但在表面上进行几何精确学习的方法仍然滞后。缺乏闭式黎曼算子、其离散对应的不可微性以及较差的并行化能力一直是网格上该领域发展的主要障碍。一种计算黎曼曲面上离散化为网格的指数映射的有效框架是直测地线，它也允许作为副产品来追踪测地线和并行传输向量。我们提供了一个并行的GPU实现，并推导了两种不同的方法来微分直测地线，一种利用外在代理函数，另一种基于测地线有限差分方案。在证明了我们的并行化性能和准确性之后，我们展示了我们可微的指数映射如何改进通用几何体上的学习和优化流程。 特别是，为了展示我们方法的多功能性，我们提出了一种新的测地线卷积层，一种新的用于网格上学习的流匹配方法，以及一个二阶优化器，我们将其应用于质心沃罗诺伊镶嵌。 我们的代码、模型和可pip安装的库（digeo）可在以下网址获得：circle-group.github.io/research/DSG。

title: Bridging the Simulation-to-Reality Gap in Electron Microscope Calibration via VAE-EM Estimation
summary: Electron microscopy has enabled many scientific breakthroughs across multiple fields. A key challenge is the tuning of microscope parameters based on images to overcome optical aberrations that deteriorate image quality. This calibration problem is challenging due to the high-dimensional and noisy nature of the diagnostic images, and the fact that optimal parameters cannot be identified from a single image. We tackle the calibration problem for Scanning Transmission Electron Microscopes (STEM) by employing variational autoencoders (VAEs), trained on simulated data, to learn low-dimensional representations of images, whereas most existing methods extract only scalar values. We then simultaneously estimate the model that maps calibration parameters to encoded representations and the optimal calibration parameters using an expectation maximization (EM) approach. This joint estimation explicitly addresses the simulation-to-reality gap inherent in data-driven methods that train on simulated data from a digital twin. We leverage the known symmetry property of the optical system to establish global identifiability of the joint estimation problem, ensuring that a unique optimum exists. We demonstrate that our approach is substantially faster and more consistent than existing methods on a real STEM, achieving a 2x reduction in estimation error while requiring fewer observations. This represents a notable advance in automated STEM calibration and demonstrates the potential of VAEs for information compression in images. Beyond microscopy, the VAE-EM framework applies to inverse problems where simulated training data introduces a reality gap and where non-injective mappings would otherwise prevent unique solutions.
tldr: The paper introduces a novel STEM calibration method using VAEs trained on simulated data and an EM approach to bridge the simulation-to-reality gap, demonstrating improved speed and accuracy compared to existing methods. It is positioned as a general solution for inverse problems with simulation-to-reality gaps.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种新的STEM校准方法，使用在模拟数据上训练的VAE和一个EM方法来弥合模拟到现实的差距，与现有方法相比，提高了速度和准确性。它被定位为具有模拟到现实差距的逆问题的通用解决方案。
summary_zh: 电子显微镜已在多个领域促成了许多科学突破。一个关键挑战是基于图像调整显微镜参数，以克服降低图像质量的光学像差。由于诊断图像具有高维和噪声的特性，且无法从单张图像中识别出最佳参数，因此该校准问题极具挑战性。我们采用变分自编码器 (VAE) 来解决扫描透射电子显微镜 (STEM) 的校准问题，该自编码器在模拟数据上进行训练，以学习图像的低维表示，而大多数现有方法仅提取标量值。然后，我们使用期望最大化 (EM) 方法同时估计将校准参数映射到编码表示的模型以及最佳校准参数。这种联合估计明确地解决了数据驱动方法中固有的仿真-现实差距，这些方法是在来自数字孪生的模拟数据上进行训练的。我们利用光学系统的已知对称性来建立联合估计问题的全局可识别性，确保存在唯一的最佳解。我们证明，我们的方法在实际的 STEM 上比现有方法更快且更具一致性，在需要更少观察的情况下，估计误差降低了 2 倍。这代表了自动 STEM 校准方面的显著进步，并展示了 VAE 在图像信息压缩方面的潜力。除了显微镜学之外，VAE-EM 框架还适用于逆问题，在这些问题中，模拟训练数据引入了真实性差距，并且非单射映射会阻止唯一解的产生。

title: Rethinking Pose Refinement in 3D Gaussian Splatting under Pose Prior and Geometric Uncertainty
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has recently emerged as a powerful scene representation and is increasingly used for visual localization and pose refinement. However, despite its high-quality differentiable rendering, the robustness of 3DGS-based pose refinement remains highly sensitive to both the initial camera pose and the reconstructed geometry. In this work, we take a closer look at these limitations and identify two major sources of uncertainty: (i) pose prior uncertainty, which often arises from regression or retrieval models that output a single deterministic estimate, and (ii) geometric uncertainty, caused by imperfections in the 3DGS reconstruction that propagate errors into PnP solvers. Such uncertainties can distort reprojection geometry and destabilize optimization, even when the rendered appearance still looks plausible. To address these uncertainties, we introduce a relocalization framework that combines Monte Carlo pose sampling with Fisher Information-based PnP optimization. Our method explicitly accounts for both pose and geometric uncertainty and requires no retraining or additional supervision. Across diverse indoor and outdoor benchmarks, our approach consistently improves localization accuracy and significantly increases stability under pose and depth noise.
tldr: This paper addresses the problem of pose refinement in 3D Gaussian Splatting by accounting for pose prior and geometric uncertainty, leading to improved localization accuracy and robustness. It proposes a relocalization framework based on Monte Carlo pose sampling and Fisher Information-based PnP optimization.
tldr_zh: 本文通过考虑姿态先验和几何不确定性来解决3D高斯溅射中的姿态细化问题，从而提高定位精度和鲁棒性。它提出了一个基于蒙特卡洛姿态采样和基于Fisher信息量的PnP优化的重定位框架。
summary_zh: 3D高斯溅射(3DGS)最近作为一种强大的场景表示方法涌现，并越来越多地被用于视觉定位和姿态优化。然而，尽管其具有高质量的可微渲染能力，但基于3DGS的姿态优化鲁棒性仍然对初始相机姿态和重建几何体高度敏感。在本文中，我们更深入地研究了这些局限性，并确定了两个主要的不确定性来源：(i) 姿态先验不确定性，通常源于回归或检索模型，这些模型输出的是单一的确定性估计，以及(ii) 几何不确定性，由3DGS重建中的缺陷引起，这些缺陷会将误差传播到PnP求解器中。即使渲染外观看起来仍然合理，这些不确定性也会扭曲重投影几何并使优化不稳定。为了解决这些不确定性，我们引入了一种重定位框架，该框架结合了蒙特卡洛姿态采样和基于Fisher信息量的PnP优化。我们的方法明确考虑了姿态和几何不确定性，并且不需要重新训练或额外的监督。在各种室内和室外基准测试中，我们的方法始终提高定位精度，并显著提高了在姿态和深度噪声下的稳定性。

title: TinyGLASS: Real-Time Self-Supervised In-Sensor Anomaly Detection
summary:
Anomaly detection plays a key role in industrial quality control, where defects must be identified despite the scarcity of labeled faulty samples. Recent self-supervised approaches, such as GLASS, learn normal visual patterns using only defect-free data and have shown strong performance on industrial benchmarks. However, their computational requirements limit deployment on resource-constrained edge platforms.
  This work introduces TinyGLASS, a lightweight adaptation of the GLASS framework designed for real-time in-sensor anomaly detection on the Sony IMX500 intelligent vision sensor. The proposed architecture replaces the original WideResNet-50 backbone with a compact ResNet-18 and introduces deployment-oriented modifications that enable static graph tracing and INT8 quantization using Sony's Model Compression Toolkit.
  In addition to evaluating performance on the MVTec-AD benchmark, we investigate robustness to contaminated training data and introduce a custom industrial dataset, named MMS Dataset, for cross-device evaluation. Experimental results show that TinyGLASS achieves 8.7x parameter compression while maintaining competitive detection performance, reaching 94.2% image-level AUROC on MVTec-AD and operating at 20 FPS within the 8 MB memory constraints of the IMX500 platform.
  System profiling demonstrates low power consumption (4.0 mJ per inference), real-time end-to-end latency (20 FPS), and high energy efficiency (470 GMAC/J). Furthermore, the model maintains stable performance under moderate levels of training data contamination.
tldr: TinyGLASS is a lightweight, self-supervised anomaly detection framework designed for real-time in-sensor deployment on resource-constrained edge devices, achieving competitive performance with significantly reduced parameters and low power consumption.
tldr_zh: TinyGLASS是一个轻量级的自监督异常检测框架，专为资源受限的边缘设备上的实时传感器内部署而设计，以显著减少的参数和低功耗实现了有竞争力的性能。
summary_zh:
异常检测在工业质量控制中起着关键作用，在此类应用中，必须在标记故障样本稀缺的情况下识别缺陷。 近期的自监督方法，如GLASS，仅使用无缺陷数据学习正常的视觉模式，并在工业基准测试中表现出强大的性能。 然而，它们的计算需求限制了其在资源受限的边缘平台上的部署。

本文介绍了TinyGLASS，它是GLASS框架的一个轻量级适配版本，专为索尼IMX500智能视觉传感器上的实时片上传感器异常检测而设计。 提出的架构将原始的WideResNet-50骨干网络替换为紧凑的ResNet-18，并引入面向部署的修改，这些修改能够使用索尼的模型压缩工具包进行静态图追踪和INT8量化。

除了评估在MVTec-AD基准测试上的性能外，我们还研究了其对受污染训练数据的鲁棒性，并引入了一个定制的工业数据集，名为MMS Dataset，用于跨设备评估。 实验结果表明，TinyGLASS实现了8.7倍的参数压缩，同时保持了具有竞争力的检测性能，在MVTec-AD上达到了94.2%的图像级别AUROC，并在IMX500平台的8 MB内存约束内以20 FPS运行。

系统分析表明，该模型具有低功耗（每次推理4.0 mJ）、实时端到端延迟 (20 FPS) 和高能效 (470 GMAC/J) 等特性。 此外，该模型在适度的训练数据污染水平下仍能保持稳定的性能。

title: ProgressiveAvatars: Progressive Animatable 3D Gaussian Avatars
summary: In practical real-time XR and telepresence applications, network and computing resources fluctuate frequently. Therefore, a progressive 3D representation is needed. To this end, we propose ProgressiveAvatars, a progressive avatar representation built on a hierarchy of 3D Gaussians grown by adaptive implicit subdivision on a template mesh. 3D Gaussians are defined in face-local coordinates to remain animatable under varying expressions and head motion across multiple detail levels. The hierarchy expands when screen-space signals indicate a lack of detail, allocating resources to important areas. Leveraging importance ranking, ProgressiveAvatars supports incremental loading and rendering, adding new Gaussians as they arrive while preserving previous content, thus achieving smooth quality improvements across varying bandwidths. ProgressiveAvatars enables progressive delivery and progressive rendering under fluctuating network bandwidth and varying compute and memory resources.
tldr: The paper introduces ProgressiveAvatars, a novel progressive 3D avatar representation using a hierarchy of 3D Gaussians on a template mesh for real-time XR and telepresence, enabling adaptive detail and incremental loading/rendering under fluctuating resources.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了 ProgressiveAvatars，一种新的渐进式 3D 头像表示方法，它使用模板网格上的 3D 高斯分层结构，用于实时 XR 和远程呈现，从而可以在资源波动的情况下实现自适应细节和增量加载/渲染。
summary_zh: 在实际的实时XR和远程呈现应用中，网络和计算资源经常波动。因此，需要一种渐进式3D表示。为此，我们提出了ProgressiveAvatars，一种基于3D高斯模型的渐进式化身表示，该模型通过在模板网格上进行自适应隐式细分来构建高斯模型的层级结构。3D高斯模型在面部局部坐标系中定义，以便在多个细节级别下保持在不同表情和头部运动下的可动画性。当屏幕空间信号表明细节不足时，该层级结构会扩展，将资源分配给重要区域。利用重要性排序，ProgressiveAvatars支持增量加载和渲染，在保留先前内容的同时添加新高斯模型，从而在变化的带宽下实现平滑的质量提升。ProgressiveAvatars能够在波动的网络带宽以及变化的计算和内存资源下实现渐进式传递和渐进式渲染。

title: Fast-HaMeR: Boosting Hand Mesh Reconstruction using Knowledge Distillation
summary: Fast and accurate 3D hand reconstruction is essential for real-time applications in VR/AR, human-computer interaction, robotics, and healthcare. Most state-of-the-art methods rely on heavy models, limiting their use on resource-constrained devices like headsets, smartphones, and embedded systems. In this paper, we investigate how the use of lightweight neural networks, combined with Knowledge Distillation, can accelerate complex 3D hand reconstruction models by making them faster and lighter, while maintaining comparable reconstruction accuracy. While our approach is suited for various hand reconstruction frameworks, we focus primarily on boosting the HaMeR model, currently the leading method in terms of reconstruction accuracy. We replace its original ViT-H backbone with lighter alternatives, including MobileNet, MobileViT, ConvNeXt, and ResNet, and evaluate three knowledge distillation strategies: output-level, feature-level, and a hybrid of both. Our experiments show that using lightweight backbones that are only 35% the size of the original achieves 1.5x faster inference speed while preserving similar performance quality with only a minimal accuracy difference of 0.4mm. More specifically, we show how output-level distillation notably improves student performance, while feature-level distillation proves more effective for higher-capacity students. Overall, the findings pave the way for efficient real-world applications on low-power devices. The code and models are publicly available under https://github.com/hunainahmedj/Fast-HaMeR.
tldr: This paper presents Fast-HaMeR, a method to accelerate 3D hand mesh reconstruction by using lightweight backbones and knowledge distillation, achieving faster inference speeds with minimal accuracy loss, improving the applicability of hand mesh reconstruction on resource-constrained devices.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了 Fast-HaMeR，一种通过使用轻量级骨干网络和知识蒸馏来加速 3D 手部网格重建的方法，在几乎不损失精度的情况下实现了更快的推理速度，从而提高了手部网格重建在资源受限设备上的适用性。
summary_zh: 快速且精确的3D手部重建对于VR/AR、人机交互、机器人和医疗保健领域的实时应用至关重要。目前最先进的方法大多依赖于庞大的模型，限制了它们在头戴设备、智能手机和嵌入式系统等资源受限设备上的使用。在本文中，我们研究了如何通过使用轻量级神经网络，并结合知识蒸馏，在保持可比重建精度的同时，使复杂的3D手部重建模型更快更轻，从而加速它们。虽然我们的方法适用于各种手部重建框架，但我们主要侧重于提升HaMeR模型，该模型目前在重建精度方面处于领先地位。我们用更轻量级的替代方案（包括MobileNet、MobileViT、ConvNeXt和ResNet）替换了其原始的ViT-H骨干网络，并评估了三种知识蒸馏策略：输出级别、特征级别以及两者的混合。我们的实验表明，使用仅为原始尺寸35%的轻量级骨干网络，可以在保持相似性能质量且仅有0.4mm的最小精度差异的情况下，实现1.5倍的推理速度提升。更具体地说，我们展示了输出级别蒸馏如何显著提高学生模型的性能，而特征级别蒸馏对于更高容量的学生模型更为有效。总的来说，这些发现为在低功耗设备上实现高效的现实世界应用铺平了道路。代码和模型已在https://github.com/hunainahmedj/Fast-HaMeR上公开。

title: SpikeCLR: Contrastive Self-Supervised Learning for Few-Shot Event-Based Vision using Spiking Neural Networks
summary: Event-based vision sensors provide significant advantages for high-speed perception, including microsecond temporal resolution, high dynamic range, and low power consumption. When combined with Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs), they can be deployed on neuromorphic hardware, enabling energy-efficient applications on embedded systems. However, this potential is severely limited by the scarcity of large-scale labeled datasets required to effectively train such models. In this work, we introduce SpikeCLR, a contrastive self-supervised learning framework that enables SNNs to learn robust visual representations from unlabeled event data. We adapt prior frame-based methods to the spiking domain using surrogate gradient training and introduce a suite of event-specific augmentations that leverage spatial, temporal, and polarity transformations. Through extensive experiments on CIFAR10-DVS, N-Caltech101, N-MNIST, and DVS-Gesture benchmarks, we demonstrate that self-supervised pretraining with subsequent fine-tuning outperforms supervised learning in low-data regimes, achieving consistent gains in few-shot and semi-supervised settings. Our ablation studies reveal that combining spatial and temporal augmentations is critical for learning effective spatio-temporal invariances in event data. We further show that learned representations transfer across datasets, contributing to efforts for powerful event-based models in label-scarce settings.
tldr: SpikeCLR introduces a contrastive self-supervised learning framework for Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) that learns robust visual representations from unlabeled event data, outperforming supervised methods in low-data regimes on event-based vision tasks.
tldr_zh: SpikeCLR 提出了一个用于脉冲神经网络 (SNN) 的对比式自监督学习框架，该框架可以从无标签事件数据中学习鲁棒的视觉表征，并且在基于事件的视觉任务的低数据情况下优于监督方法。
summary_zh: 基于事件的视觉传感器为高速感知提供了显著优势，包括微秒级的时间分辨率、高动态范围和低功耗。当与脉冲神经网络（SNN）结合使用时，它们可以部署在神经形态硬件上，从而在嵌入式系统上实现节能应用。然而，大规模带标签数据集的稀缺严重限制了这种潜力，因为这些数据集是有效训练此类模型所必需的。在这项工作中，我们介绍了一种对比自监督学习框架SpikeCLR，该框架使SNN能够从无标签事件数据中学习鲁棒的视觉表征。我们使用代理梯度训练将先前的基于帧的方法适配到脉冲域，并引入了一套特定于事件的数据增强方法，这些方法利用了空间、时间和极性变换。通过在CIFAR10-DVS、N-Caltech101、N-MNIST和DVS-Gesture基准上的大量实验，我们证明了自监督预训练结合后续微调优于低数据环境下的监督学习，在少样本和半监督设置中实现了持续的提升。我们的消融研究表明，结合空间和时间数据增强对于学习事件数据中有效的时空不变性至关重要。我们进一步表明，学习到的表征可以跨数据集迁移，从而为标签稀缺环境中强大的基于事件的模型做出贡献。

title: Behavior-Centric Extraction of Scenarios from Highway Traffic Data and their Domain-Knowledge-Guided Clustering using CVQ-VAE
summary: Approval of ADS depends on evaluating its behavior within representative real-world traffic scenarios. A common way to obtain such scenarios is to extract them from real-world data recordings. These can then be grouped and serve as basis on which the ADS is subsequently tested.
